title: HELPING HANDS RESOURCES CLOTHING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS RESOURCES HELPING HANDS RESOURCES CLOTHING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, bedding, household items, and clothing for babies and newborns. Items are subject to availability. 1755 13th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Saturday 9am-noon, closed holidays Email (503) 364-9936 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 364-9936 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Drivers license or state ID card, in addition to contact information AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97071, 97086, 97137, 97301, 97302, 97303, 97304, 97305, 97350 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on 13th Street just south of Rural Street, and north of Hoyt Street. Services: Baby Clothing Bedding/Linen Children's Clothing General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Shoes Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHES THAT WORK MATERIAL GOODS - WORK WEAR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
